title: 'One by one': Another US jet after F-15E crashes into Hormuz after being shot down by Iran; watch
summary_full: An American A-10 Thunderbolt II jet crashed into the Strait of Hormuz shortly after an F-15E Strike Eagle was reportedly shot down over Iran. The Iranian embassy in South Africa shared footage, claiming "American fighter jets are being shot down one by one." The A-10's pilot was safely rescued, though details surrounding the crash remain scarce.
